title: aloe × curta
intro: Aloe × curta, also known as the aloe hybrid, is a cross between Aloe ferox and Aloe plicatilis, resulting in a plant with unique characteristics. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of aloin and aloe-emodin, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aloe × curta include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the healing of wounds, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Aloe × curta is often used in herbal preparations, such as ointments, creams, and gels, to create topical treatments that can be applied directly to the skin for optimal benefits.
